notes: JUDGEMENT's six-face arcana die. HEARD is the highest success. SILENT is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The name lands. The W row's reader pauses. Advance two.
Success ★. The candle catches. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The reading drifts. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CALL).
Partial. The wind through the cypresses. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CALL).
Failure. The voice didn't carry. +1 CALL.
Wild. ★ if you have read three names this evening. Otherwise: failure, and the lamps flicker as a chord.
